$jsonSchema.description: Employee document representing a staff member; referenced by sales documents

name.description: Full name of the employee - required

email.description: Work email address of the employee - required

phone.description: Contact phone number of the employee - required

storeId.description: Reference to the store where the employee works - required

role.description: Role of the employee within the store

hiredAt.description: Date when the employee was hired - required
